name: Principal Adverse Impacts (PAI) consideration policy

regulatory_anchors.article: Annex I (mandatory and additional PAI indicator tables)

summary: Tests whether the developer-entity has a documented policy for considering principal adverse impacts of investment decisions on sustainability factors (PAI). The PB framing accepts a substantive policy with named indicators tracked rather than only a comply-or-explain statement.
successor_regime_note: Under proposed SFDR 2.0 (Commission proposal COM(2025) 841, tabled 2025), the PAI regime is expected to be retained but potentially streamlined. PB Art 8/Art 9 verdicts issued under methodology v3.3 are stamped to SFDR v1 (Reg 2019/2088 as consolidated 09/01/2024) and remain valid as of date of issue.
